one_time_description: Loss on disposal of tangible capital assets
economic_notes: Nation owns White Bear Lake Golf Course Inc., White Bear Lake Resort Inc., White Bear Holdings Ltd., White Bear Industrial Works Limited Partnership and Ltd. Oil and gas operations through White Bear Oil and Gas Enterprise, White Bear Oil and Gas Ltd., Wabimusqua Oil and Gas Ltd. Member of Bear Claw Community Development Incorporated which distributes proceeds from Dakota Dunes, Painted Hand, and Northern Lights Casinos. Funds held in Ottawa Trust Fund suspense account totalling $8,704,859 related to disputed oil-producing strip of land along northern boundary.
notes: White Bear First Nations is located in Saskatchewan. Five entities consolidated (White Bear First Nations, White Bear First Nation CMHC Housing, White Bear Oil and Gas Enterprise, White Bear Oil and Gas Ltd., Wabimusqua Oil and Gas Ltd., Wabimusqua Oil and Gas Limited Partnership). Five business entities accounted for using modified equity method. $8,704,859 held in suspense in Ottawa Trust Fund related to disputed northern boundary oil lands — Nation does not have access to these funds. Wabimusqua entities have December 31 year-end (non-coterminous). FNIH funding of $1,191,402 included in total government transfers. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + FNIH + SITAG + CMHC + FSIN = 7,585,706 + 1,191,402 + 358,377 + 56,050 + 278,515 = 9,470,050. Expenses by segment exclude housing which is embedded in CMHC entity. Schedule of remuneration not provided in extracted text.
